overview: Functional medicine practice in Boulder focusing on identifying and treating the root causes of chronic illness and symptoms. Offers integrative medical care combining conventional and natural approaches.
highlights: Specialties in mold toxicity, Lyme disease, and chronic fatigue
20+ years of practice by physicians trained in functional medicine
targetAudience: Patients with chronic illnesses seeking root-cause functional medicine approaches, including those with mold toxicity, Lyme disease, and hormone imbalance.
